meaning: adj.(鞋类或衣服)有襻的,有带子的
examples: Paired with strappy heels and a Chanel quilted bag Emma was on trend for summer in July 2009.
She still remembers the rush she got when she found a pair of strappy gold heel sandals at a boutique in Brazil.
Strappy sandals chic capri pants and an off-the-shoulder blouse make your entrance into any social event one to take notice of.
When it comes to shoes, Ms. Acra steers clear of chunky styles, favoring strappy heels or flats.
Your casual dresses should include bias-cut floor-length sundresses and skirts with cotton gauze tops, worn with flat or low-wedge strappy sandals or espadrilles.
